---
title: "Session 23 - Effect Size and Outliers"
name: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "18 March 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

```{r setup}
# Load necessary packages
library(dplyr)
library(rstatix)
set.seed(123)

```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# 1. Original data (from previous session)
# ---------------------------

# Example vectors (replace these with your actual a, b, c if already defined)
a <- rnorm(10, mean=10, sd=10)
b <- rnorm(10, mean=20, sd=10)
c <- rnorm(10, mean=30, sd=10)

abcBox <- data.frame(
  values = c(a, b, c),
  group = factor(rep(c("a", "b", "c"), each=length(a)))
)

# Boxplot to visualize
boxplot(values ~ group, data=abcBox,
        main="Original a,b,c values",
        col=c("lightblue", "lightpink", "lightgreen"))
```
```{r}
# ---------------------------
# 2. Parametric test: ANOVA
# ---------------------------
res_anova <- aov(values ~ group, data=abcBox)
summary(res_anova)

# Effect size
eta_squared(res_anova)
```


```{r}
```


```{r}
```
